title: Exercises: Merkle Trees
description: Hands-on exercises implementing Merkle trees and signature schemes

exercises.title: Merkle Tree Implementation
exercises.description: Implement a complete Merkle tree with construction and verification.
exercises.task: Create a Merkle tree class with build, get_path, and verify_path methods.

testCases.input: mt = MerkleTree(3); leaves = [b'a'+bytes([i]) for i in range(8)]; root = mt.build(leaves); len(root) == 32
mt = MerkleTree(3); leaves = [b'a'+bytes([i]) for i in range(8)]; root = mt.build(leaves); path = mt.get_auth_path(3); mt.verify(leaves[3], 3, path, root)

hints: Build bottom-up: hash pairs at each level
Auth path: sibling at each level
Verify: combine with siblings to recompute root

exercises.title: Merkle Signature Scheme
exercises.description: Implement a complete Merkle signature scheme.
exercises.task: Create MSS with keygen, sign, and verify operations.
exercises.starterCode:
import hashlib
import secrets
from typing import Optional, Tuple, List

class MSS:
    def __init__(self, height: int = 4):
        self.height = height
        self.state = 0
        self.ots_keys = []
        self.tree = None
        self.root = None
    
    def keygen(self) -> bytes:
        """Generate keys, return public key (root)."""
        pass
    
    def sign(self, message: bytes) -> Optional[dict]:
        """Sign message, return signature or None if exhausted."""
        pass
    
    def verify(self, pk: bytes, message: bytes, sig: dict) -> bool:
        """Verify signature."""
        pass

testCases.input: mss = MSS(3); pk = mss.keygen(); sig = mss.sign(b'test'); mss.verify(pk, b'test', sig)

hints: Build Merkle tree over OTS public keys
Include leaf index in state management

exercises.title: State Management Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze state management issues in MSS.
exercises.task: Implement tools to detect and analyze state reuse vulnerabilities.

testCases.input: sa = StateAnalyzer(16); [sa.record_signature(i) for i in range(5)]; len(sa.simulate_backup_restore(2)) == 3

hints: At-risk = indices used after restore point

exercises.title: Signature Size Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate Merkle signature sizes for different parameters.
hints: Sig = OTS sig + OTS pk + auth path + index
